full_text:
Che Zhou 車冑
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Che Zhou (車冑). The Inspector of Xu Province, he was killed by Liu Bei. Che Zhou was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Che Zhou lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Che Zhou was the Inspector of Xu Province shortly after Liu Bei left. In early 200, Liu Bei came to Xiapi and killed Che Zhou, though the details are not known.
